description_long: This is a standard wine bottle with a dark, nearly black glass body and a long, slender neck topped with a red capsule. The front of the bottle features a large, rectangular cream-colored label with fine text and a subtle illustration, likely indicating the wine's origin and vintage. The bottle's neck is straight and moderately long, smoothly tapering from the body to the closure. The closure appears to be covered by a red foil or capsule, giving the bottle a classic and elegant appearance. The back and sides of the bottle are unadorned, emphasizing the deep, opaque color of the glass. The overall design is typical of red wine bottles, intended to convey sophistication and preserve the wine inside.
description: A dark glass wine bottle with a red capsule and a large cream label on the front, exuding a classic and elegant appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cream-colored label with text and illustration, and the red capsule on the neck.
description_view_1: Side view with the label partially visible, highlighting the bottle's slender profile and the red capsule.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the unadorned, dark glass surface with no visible label or markings.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the full label and the transition from the bottle body to the neck and capsule.
attribute_label_or_branding: Large rectangular cream-colored label on the front with fine text and a subtle illustration, likely including the wine's name, origin, and vintage. The label is bordered and covers a significant portion of the bottle's front. No visible logos or symbols on the back or sides.
attribute_bottle_neck_shape: Straight, moderately long neck with a gentle taper from the body to the closure, topped with a flared lip under the capsule.
